'''Taratan''' was a [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] captive of the [[Yevetha]] from [[Doornik-319]]. He along with all the other Yevethan captives escaped thanks to the help of the [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] [[Enara]].
